title: Hbs Satellites
description: Monitor distant chunks and entities on a futuristic 3D terrain map; launch attacks from the comfort of your base.
body:
### HB’s Satellites - Forge & Fabric 1.20.1 - and more versions soon!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ru7EmZ52Dnk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Overview

**HB’s Satellites** is a Minecraft mod that allows you to view distant terrain in a futuristic 3D style.  
The **Satellite Block** may be placed anywhere in the world and streams a live feed to the **Controller** and **Display Blocks**.

Block Texture Art: @kovrik337 (discord)
Item Upgrade Texture Art: @DylanJordaan...again

The **Controller Block** can adjust:
- Viewing area  
- Viewing depth  
- Viewing height

**Target Controller Block**
- Target any position on the map and a hint will show the exact block position
- When "Firing" the weapon, the weapon stored inside is triggered and a message is sent to the Target Receiver
- The only currently supported weapon is a Redstone torch which sets a Waypoint in the world
- 
**Target Receiver Bock** 
- receives the set location from the Target Controller Block and emit a redstone signal when the **Target Controller** "Fired"

The terrain appears as a **3D semi-holographic diorama**, letting players explore and monitor vast stretches of land remotely.  
Hostile and friendly entities appear as **pings** on the satellite feed — customizable in the config file.
Satellite Upgrades (Not craftable for now)

- **MultilinkUpgrade**: allows connecting multiple displays to a single satellite (not in use)
-  **Ore Scanner Upgrade**: allows viewing ores on the satellite display (ores to view can be configured in the configs)
- **Range Upgrade**: increases satellite operational viewing range
- **Depth Upgrade**: increases satellite depth viewing range
- **Entity Scanner Upgrade**: reveals entities as colored pings on the display
- **Player Scanner Upgrade**: distinguishes players between green (friendly) and red (enemy) depending on their dyed items
-  **Entity Detector Upgrade** - all display blocks emit a redstone signal if an entity occupies their viewing range, strength of signal proportional to entityType
	- green ping - 3
	- white ping - 6
	- blue ping - 9
	- red ping - 12


---

## Why You Might Want This Mod

- Monitor distant areas for resources or enemies  
- Scout an enemy base or spy on friends  
- Locate ores or distant structures
- (Future) Launch aerial or ballistic attacks using satellite data  

---

## Main Features

- **Satellite Block:**  
  Can be placed anywhere and **loads distant chunks as necessary**.

- **Controller Block:**  
  Links to the Satellite Block by matching wool color.  
  Right-click the colored section with a wool block to set it directly.

- **Display Blocks:**  
  Add as many as you like to view different perspectives around the satellite.  
  Use the Controller to navigate ordinally or descend into caves.

- **Interactive Hologram:**  
  The hologram lights up as you hover.  
  Right-click any block to get its exact coordinates.

---
